description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat rooftop terrace with a swimming pool, large umbrella, and potted plants, creating a luxurious outdoor living space. The upper level is surrounded by a glass railing, providing safety while maintaining an open view. The facade is a mix of brick and light-colored paneling, accented by vertical and horizontal greenery, including climbing vines and lush planters. Large floor-to-ceiling windows dominate both levels, allowing ample natural light into the interior spaces. The lower level includes a shaded patio area with outdoor furniture and additional potted plants, enhancing the building's connection to nature. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of natural and modern materials.
description: A modern bungalow with a rooftop terrace, pool, glass railings, large windows, and abundant greenery. The design features clean lines, brick and panel facades, and spacious outdoor living areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rooftop pool, umbrella, glass railings, and large windows with vertical greenery on the facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extensive green wall, glass railings, and the edge of the rooftop terrace with visible pool and umbrella.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the shaded patio area, large windows, climbing vines, and the upper terrace with trees and umbrella.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the green wall, pool, glass railings, and potted plants at the entrance.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large floor-to-ceiling windows on both levels
